ui.title: FX Exchange Rates
ui.desc: Display current currency exchange rates relative to USD.

data.sql: SELECT C_FROM_CCY as "Currency", C_TO_CCY as "Base", F_VALUE as "Rate", C_DESC_ID as "Rate_Type" FROM %EXIMSYS%.STD_EXCHAN_RATE WHERE C_TO_CCY = 'USD' AND C_FROM_CCY IN ('EUR', 'GBP', 'AUD', 'CNY', 'JPY', 'CAD', 'CHF') AND C_DESC_ID = 'Selling Rate'
